data.name: label1.Text
data.value: Near the empty pedestal stood a small alien visitor. He had arrived the week before and had helped the city understand the crystal’s energy. Now he looked worried. “It was here last night,” he said softly. Pusheen narrowed his eyes. This was serious. The investigation began. They searched near Medicine. They checked behind School. They even looked inside Cat Karaoke (just in case someone tried to charge it with singing). Nothing.
